case_title: VOJNO CORPORATION VS. BK MOTORSPORT INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY VOJNO CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT BK MOTORSPORT INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR NOV-30-2017 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT BK MOTORSPORT INC. TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT VOJNO CORPORATION DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED

NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT BK MOTORSPORT INC. MAILED TO RESPONDENT VOJNO CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BELA KIRALY FOR BK MOTORSPORTS. FILED BY APPELLANT BK MOTORSPORT INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY BK MOTORSPORT INC.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2017 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. BK MOTORPSORT INC. DOES NOT OWE VOJNO CORPORATION ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF SEP-15-2017. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. APPELLANT BK MOTORSPORT INC IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY RESPONDENT, VOJNO CORPORATION. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT STUMPF, CLERK: W.TRUPEK (525) NOT REPORTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUL-29-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BK MOTORSPORT INC.
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE BALINT VOJNITS, CEO FOR VOJNO CORPORATION, AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE BELLA KIRALY, CEO FOR BK MOTORSPORT, INC. JUDITH BACSKAT WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS HUNGARIAN SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR MR. KIRALY. THE COURT DENIES DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VOJNO CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BK MOTORSPORT INC. $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF VOJNO CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BK MOTORSPORT INC.
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-30-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant/Defendant: BK Motorsport Inc, represented by Bela Kiraly, CEO, present
Respondent/Plaintiff: Vojno Corporation, no appearance

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn

BK Motorsport Inc, Appellant/Defendant represented by Bela Kiraly, CEO, testifies on behalf of BK Motorsport Inc, assisted by court appointed interperter Judith Bacskai (Hungarian)

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Group Exhibit 1: Time table, notes, invoices

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Stumpf, Clerk: W. Trupek, (525) Not Reported

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
